page_metadata.biotools__summary: ParaMol is a package for automatic parameterization of molecular mechanics force fields. ParaMol is a Python library that aims to ease the process of force field parametrization of molecules.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: ParaMol is a package for automatic parameterization of molecular mechanics force fields. ParaMol is a Python library that aims to ease the process of force field parametrization of molecules.
